mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(d.dt, 'MM/DD') AS label, NVL(s.cnt, 0) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL - 1) AS dt FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(created_at) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_tbl WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 4 GROUP BY TRUNC(created_at) ) s ON s.dt = d.dt ORDER BY d.dt

SELECT TO_CHAR(d.dt, 'MM/DD') AS label, NVL(p.cnt, 0) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL - 1) AS dt FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRUNC(approved_at) AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payment_order WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND approved_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 4 GROUP BY TRUNC(approved_at) ) p ON p.dt = d.dt ORDER BY d.dt
SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM payment_order GROUP BY status
